$comment: Template for extracting one chapter of หลักมหาภูต into the Canon Database. Copy the entities into canon_database.knowme.json and edit. RULES: (1) every unit must trace to a book→chapter→section→topic→page via 'location'. (2) book.sourceId must exist in canon_sources.json — tier/canonical authority derives from it. (3) keep verbatim quotes in evidence; never summarize a source away. (4) units only become Tier-1 Canon when validationStatus = canonApproved. Delete these examples before committing real data.
